response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling, including MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of GenAI-specific projects, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent system frameworks. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not deeply tied to GenAI delivery or enterprise customer-facing technical leadership.
strengths: Strong background in full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, including AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams, demonstrated by staff-level roles and workshop creation
Extensive experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and scalable systems handling high-volume data
concerns: Limited visible experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI-specific production systems
No clear evidence of multi-agent system framework implementations (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI)
Resumes focuses heavily on general software engineering rather than GenAI/cloud infrastructure delivery
